title: The $100 Million Broadway Season: Inside the Most Expensive Productions Ever Staged | NY Spotlight Report
description:
With production costs soaring past $20 million per show, the 2023-2024 season tested whether Broadway's economic model can survive its own ambitions.

Full story: https://nyspotlightreport.com/blog/100-million-broadway-season-2024/
